[Council Memory] {"topic":"hiện tại tôi đang run ứng dụng ở http://localhost:3010/planning bạn reading các file trong folder docs/* để hiểu nghiệp vụ sau đó đi vào url http://localhost:3010/planning để reserach bàn luận đánh giá hướng phát triển tiếp theo nhé ( full focus ui only và full forcus workspace planning ) nhớ research đối chiếu thêm ở internet nữa nhé","spec":{"problemStatement":"hiện tại tôi đang run ứng dụng ở http://localhost:3010/planning bạn reading các file trong folder docs/* để hiểu nghiệp vụ sau đó đi vào url http://localhost:3010/planning để reserach bàn luận đánh giá hướng phát triển tiếp theo nhé ( full focus ui only và full forcus workspace planning ) nhớ research đối chiếu thêm ở internet nữa nhé","constraints":[],"successCriteria":["Address the topic: hiện tại tôi đang run ứng dụng ở http://localhost:3010/planning bạn reading các file trong folder do"],"scope":"Determined by conversation context","rawQA":[]},"debatePlan":{"intentSummary":"(planner unavailable — using generic stances)","stances":[{"name":"Primary Analyst","lens":"Address the success criteria with concrete reasoning."},{"name":"Critical Reviewer","lens":"Stress-test claims, surface missing evidence, identify risks."}],"outputShape":{"kind":"decision","sections":[{"key":"agreed","heading":"Agreed","prompt":"points participants converged on","shape":"list"},{"key":"tradeoffs","heading":"Trade-offs","prompt":"real trade-offs identified","shape":"list"},{"key":"recommendation","heading":"Recommendation","prompt":"decisive verdict","shape":"text"}],"guardrails":["Be evidence-grounded; flag any claim that lacks support."]}},"participants":[{"role":"implement","model":"deepseek-v4-flash","stance":{"name":"Primary Analyst","lens":"Address the success criteria with concrete reasoning."}},{"role":"verify","model":"deepseek-v4-pro","stance":{"name":"Critical Reviewer","lens":"Stress-test claims, surface missing evidence, identify risks."}}],"finalPositions":[{"role":"implement","position":""},{"role":"verify","position":""}],"synthesis":"{
  "type": "decision",
  "summary": "Agreed to proceed with UI‑only prototype (Sprint A) labeled as non‑operational, implementing virtual rendering, toasts, static constraint warnings, and a validation rule abstraction, while gating live‑ops safety features (server‑side checks, dynamic tides) behind a separate Sprint B.",
  "agreed": [
    "UI‑first improvements (virtual rendering, error toasts, drag‑drop refinement) are safe for a usability prototype with mock data and an explicit ‘not for operational use’ banner.",
    "Client‑side geometry checks (using static berthConfig) and priority‑aware warnings are acceptable for demo, but back‑end enforcement is mandatory before any live plan is handed off.",
    "An abstraction in validationRules.js will be implemented now to simplify future swap from client‑side checks to server‑side rule calls.",
    "Tidal window overlays from static JSON are acceptable for demo only; dynamic tide data is a prerequisite for production."
  ],
  "tradeoffs": [
    "Residual risk of false negatives (e.g., safety‑buffer, dynamic tide drift) is accepted for prototype because it will not be used operationally.",
    "Drag‑and‑drop gain of 40% is based on external studies and unverified in this domain; a measured baseline is deferred to maintain velocity, but will need validation before Sprint B investment.",
    "The current drag‑and‑drop is vanilla, not dnd‑kit; refactor effort may be larger than assumed."
  ],
  "recommendation": "Launch Sprint A as a strictly labeled (non‑operational) UI prototype with virtual rendering, error toasts, static constraint warnings, and the validationRule abstraction. In parallel, define the Sprint B backend contract (safety buffers, priority enforcement, dynamic tides) and collect a direct planning‑time baseline to justify further investment."
}

---READABLE---
## Agreed
- **UI‑first is safe for a prototype** – The entire team converged that pure client‑side improvements (virtual rendering, drag‑and‑drop re","stats":{"calls":0,"durationMs":710576,"phases":[{"name":"clarify+preflight","durationMs":70382},{"name":"plan_debate","durationMs":48621},{"name":"debate","durationMs":501943},{"name":"planning","durationMs":89618}]},"timestamp":"2026-05-08T07:25:04.548Z"}
